title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: After onboarding, tapping "Share Data" on the PPIP dialog enables the share data toggle in Account settings and displays the Home screen.
steps: Start app for first time, go through onboarding, tap 'Continue as Guest' → PPIP dialog shown: 'Help us improve your experience.'
Tap 'Share Data', select any option on location permission (iOS only) → Dialog closes, Home screen displayed.

Go to App Settings > General > Account → Share data toggle is ON with description about sharing basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) — no personal data shared with third parties.
expected: After tapping "Share Data" and granting location permission (iOS), the dialog closes, the Home screen is displayed, and in App Settings > General > Account, the Share data toggle is ON with a description stating that only basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared and no personal data is shared with third parties.
